sections.title: If the player is a house guest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [House owner] killed an abyssal demon! Cool!

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Cool for [him/her] maybe. How would you like to be stuck on a wall?

sections.title: If the player is the house owner

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Have you considered visiting THE ABYSS?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I visit the abyss all the time!

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: I bet you just rush through it though. Everyone there is in such a rush. No one stops to appreciate the beauty of THE ABYSS.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to run through it quickly or I'll die!

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Death is a small thing compared to the beauty of THE ABYSS.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The abyss looks pretty ugly to me.

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Poor deluded fool. There is no hope for you at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's too scary for me!

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: But does not the fear contribute to your appreciation of THE ABYSS?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it's just scary.

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Poor human. You must not judge THE ABYSS by the standards of this world. You must learn to embrace your fear as part of the experience of THE ABYSS.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose fear does heighten the senses.

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: Then you should enhance them further by raising the stakes. Next time you go to THE ABYSS you should take all your most valuable items with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I get an abyssal whip?

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: You must take all your gold and all your most valued items, and take them into THE ABYSS without weapons or armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And then will I get an abyssal whip?

lines.speaker: Abyssal demon
lines.text: You'll get an ABYSSAL WHIPPING!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That pun was abyssmal.
